data.title: Retail sentiment on Bitcoin crucial, says Swan Bitcoin CEO. Ownership not concentrated, unlike Blackrock.
data.description: "It is crucial to monitor retail sentiment regarding Bitcoin," stated Cory Klippsten, CEO of Swan Bitcoin. He emphasized the importance of recognizing that ownership of Bitcoin is not yet concentrated, citing that major institutions like Blackrock do not possess a significant portion of Bitcoin. Klippsten highlighted the decentralized nature of Bitcoin ownership and the significance of retail investors in shaping its market dynamics.

data.title: Former Celsius CEO Mashinsky aims to reverse 12-year fraud sentence, points to legal representation issues.
data.description: Former CEO of Celsius, Alex Mashinsky, has filed a motion to vacate his sentence of 12 years, alleging ineffective legal representation and issues with the evidence presented in his case. The motion aims to overturn the sentence imposed on Mashinsky.

data.title: Emerging drug development in China overshadows U.S. at oncology event in Chicago, sparking concern over American industry.
data.description: At an international oncology conference in Chicago, clinical trials conducted in China are attracting significant interest. The surging biotechnology sector in China has raised concerns that the United States' leading position in the industry may be weakening. Attendees are actively discussing this shift in power dynamics, highlighting the increasing number of clinical trials being carried out in China and the potential implications this has on U.S. leadership in oncology research.

data.title: The Results of Phase III OptiTROP-Lung05 Study of Sacituzumab Tirumotecan (sac-TMT) Presented as an ASCO Oral Presentation and Simultaneously Published in The Lancet
data.description: Today, in Chengdu, China, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. (6990.HK) revealed at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago the findings of the Phase III clinical trial OptiTROP-Lung05.

data.title: Kelun-Biotech Presents Pivotal Phase II Data for Lunbotinib Fumarate (A400/EP0031) in RET Fusion-Positive NSCLC at 2026 ASCO
data.description: Recently in Chengdu, China, on May 29, 2026, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. disclosed updates. The company, identified as 6990.HK, unveiled findings at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago, USA. The event showcased outcomes from the crucial Phase II trial conducted by the Company.

data.title: MENDOCINO FARMS LAUNCHES SUMMER MENU IN ANTICIPATION OF 100TH STORE MILESTONE
data.description: Mendocino Farms, a popular fast-casual restaurant celebrated for its innovative flavor fusions in salads, has launched three seasonal offerings across the nation as part of its "Adventure Tastes Like This" menu. The introduction took place on May 29, 2026, in Los Angeles. Promising unique taste experiences, the dishes are now available at all Mendocino Farms locations nationwide.

data.title: Art Garfunkel Makes Surprise Return to Madison Square Garden with Charlie Puth in Special Performance of "The Boxer"
data.description: Art Garfunkel, a Rock & Roll Hall of Fame inductee and eight-time Grammy Award winner, joined forces with multi-platinum superstar Puth for a memorable event in New York on May 29, 2026. Garfunkel, known as the legendary voice of generations, collaborated with Puth for an unforgettable evening. This partnership brought together two music powerhouses to deliver a remarkable performance. The event showcased Garfunkel's enduring talent and Puth's current success, creating a night to remember for the audience. The collaboration between these two artists highlighted their combined influence in the music industry, appealing to a wide range of fans.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs experience historic outflows with $2.8B withdrawn in nine days. BlackRock’s IBIT leads with $2B. Institutional interest wanes as BTC falls to $72,745.
data.description: Bitcoin Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) experienced a significant outflow of $2.8 billion within a nine-day period, with the largest withdrawal of $2 billion coming from BlackRock's IBIT. This trend signals weakening institutional demand amid a drop in Bitcoin's value to $72,745.

data.title: Humana Investigation Continued: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Continues to Investigate the Officers and Directors of Humana Inc. - HUM
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), shared that KSF is actively investigating Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM). The investigation into the company began on January 18. Charles C. Foti Jr., along with KSF, is studying the activities and financial data of Humana to gather information.

data.title: FCPT Announces Agreement to Acquire up to 102 Mission Pet Health Veterinary Properties for $268 Million
data.description: A real estate investment trust known as Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), specializing in owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has confirmed a significant deal. They have officially agreed to purchase a maximum of 102 Mission Pet Health ("MPH") veterinary properties from Shore Capital Real Estate Partners Fund I for a sum reaching $268.0 million. This acquisition underlines FCPT's strategy to expand its portfolio and invest in high-quality assets within the sector.

data.title: Harvey FORUM in New York showcases AI's growing impact on legal industry, moving from testing to full adoption.
data.description: A recent event in New York, the Harvey FORUM, highlighted the legal sector's shift from merely testing AI systems to implementing them on a larger scale. This shift is seen as a way to redefine workflows and governance within the sector. The event showcased the development and adoption of AI technologies in legal processes, with a focus on scaling operational systems. This transition underscores the industry's commitment to incorporating innovative technologies to improve efficiency. This shift towards scaling AI in operations is expected to significantly impact how legal services are delivered in the future.

data.title: ICE CEO Sprecher urges regulation for onchain perpetual futures amid competition from Hyperliquid, emphasizing need for clarity on 24/7 trading.
data.description: Jeffrey Sprecher, CEO of ICE, is urging for clear regulations regarding 24/7 onchain perpetual futures due to increasing competition from platforms such as Hyperliquid. Sprecher emphasizes the need for regulatory clarity in this rapidly growing sector. It is crucial as the competition heats up, with platforms like Hyperliquid gaining traction. This call for clearer regulations comes as the industry witnesses a surge in interest and investment. Sprecher's concern stems from the need to navigate this competitive landscape while ensuring transparency and investor protection. This push for regulatory clarity by ICE's CEO reflects the growing complexities and challenges faced by companies operating in the cryptocurrency derivatives market.

data.title: Visit Conejo Valley Invites Travelers to Discover "101 Things to Do Just Off the 101"
data.description: A recently released guide is showcasing popular spots, outdoor activities, attractions for families, and undiscovered treasures in Thousand Oaks and Agoura Hills, located in Conejo Valley, California. The tourism organization, Visit Conejo Valley, is encouraging visitors to explore the picturesque area. The guide provides detailed information on must-visit locations and activities in the region, aiming to enhance the travel experience.

data.title: Plaza Home Mortgage Announces Security Incident
data.description: On May 29, 2026 in Costa Mesa, California, Simpluris, Inc. announced that Plaza Home Mortgage® (Plaza) had informed affected customers and employees about a security breach. The incident occurred earlier on the same day. Simpluris, Inc. is acting as the notice administrator for this issue. The exact number of impacted individuals was not disclosed in the statement.

data.title: Fobi AI Provides Corporate Update Regarding FFCTO Revocation Process and Q3 Interim Filings
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on May 29, 2026, Fobi, a company specializing in AI-driven data intelligence and digital wallet services, shared details about their progress in addressing the current failure to file cease trade order (FFCTO) and the plans for the reinstatement of trading of their common shares on the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV).

data.title: Think Together Recognizes Paramount Unified School District as its 2026 Champion of Change Award Recipient
data.description: In Paramount Unified, a partnership between Think Together and the district benefits 3,308 students by providing excellent expanded learning programs. This collaboration in Paramount, California commenced on May 29, 2026, with Think Together being the state's leading nonprofit organization offering expanded learning services.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Dive On Iran Deal Hopes; Tesla, 5 AI Stocks Near Buy Points
data.description: Expectations for a potential Iran deal led to a surge in futures while oil prices experienced a significant drop on Monday. President Trump mentioned there is no urgency regarding the matter. Dow Jones futures saw an increase and various stocks related to artificial intelligence, including Tesla, were nearing optimal buying points. These developments were reported without specifying the source.

data.title: PACSUN DROPS EXCLUSIVE GOVERNORS BALL COLLECTION AHEAD OF FESTIVAL WEEKEND
data.description: The latest collection from Pacsun is a unique mix of New York City streetwear influences, vintage-inspired graphics, and festival-style fashion. Set to debut in Los Angeles on May 29, 2026, the line celebrates the comeback of the Governors Ball Music Festival. This exclusive collection combines contemporary streetwear elements with retro designs, catering to fashion-conscious festival-goers.

data.title: Sena Launches "The Instinct," a New Brand Campaign Positioning Sena as the Identity Brand of the Next Generation of Riders
data.description: The advertisement launches on various platforms such as CTV, YouTube, and paid social media, depicting the deep bond between riders and the road. Sena Technologies, Inc., based in Irving, Texas, announced this on May 29, 2026. They are the leading provider of motorcycle communication solutions, highlighting their contribution to enhancing every journey.

data.title: CLPS Incorporation Receives Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Requirements
data.description: In Hong Kong on May 29, 2026, CLPS Incorporation, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CLPS, revealed that it has been issued a Notification Letter dated May 27, 2026, from the Listing Qualifications Department of Nasdaq.
